title: Cracked Nether Bricks
description: Adds magma animation in nether brick cracks.
body:
# Cracked Nether Bricks **Hi!** In this pack, I made a small change of Cracked Nether Bricks! Now it has more cracks and subtle magma animation. If you use OptiFine and turn emissive textures on, it will glow!
**Hope you like it!**
